ProductUse CasesSecurityBenchmarksDocsRoadmapOpen AppDocs Hub

Security

Security and compliance posture

Crowkis security messaging based on present documentation, with no roadmap-only guarantees.

Anti-poisoning pipeline

Crowkis treats write safety as a core product concern with multi-stage checks before reuse.

Source: crowkis/crowkis.docs/CROWKIS_USP_AND_FEATURE_POSITIONING.md

PII and tenant boundaries

PII scrubbing, tenant isolation, and erasure-oriented management surfaces are part of current scope.

Source: crowkis/README.md

Access and control

RBAC users, API keys, sessions, and SAML config surface are available in management workflows.

Source: crowkis/README.md

Crowkis is the intelligent control and cache layer between applications and LLM providers.

Built in Rust. Designed for safe reuse, lower latency, and lower spend.
